query:
(_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourcecategory=cseinsight insightupdated) 
| json field=_raw "insight.signals[*].ruleId", "insight.tags",  "insight.created", "eventTime", "insight.timeToResponse", "insight.timeToDetection" ,"insight.timeToRemediation","insight.assignee", "operator.email",  "insight.status", "insight.resolution", "insight.severity", "insight.closed", "insight.source" , "insight.entityValue","insight.entityType", "insight.entityId", "insight.description",  "insight.name", "insight.readableId", "insight.id"  as insight_ruleId, insight_tags, insight_createdAt, insight_event_time, insight_time_to_response , insight_time_to_detection, insight_time_to_remediation , insight_assignee , operator_email, insight_status, insight_resolution, insight_severity, insight_closedAt, insight_source, entity_value, entity_type, entity_id, insight_description, insight_name, insight_readableId, insight_Id nodrop
| where insight_status = "closed"
| json field=_raw "insight.signals.length()" as signal_count
| replace(insight_tags, "[","") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_tags, "]","") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_tags, "\"","") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_tags, ","," | ") as insight_tags
| replace(insight_ruleId, "[","") as insight_ruleId
| replace(insight_ruleId, "]","") as insight_ruleId
| replace(insight_ruleId, "\"","") as insight_ruleId
| replace(insight_ruleId, ","," | ") as insight_ruleId
| if(isBlank(insight_assignee), "Unassigned", insight_assignee) as insight_assignee

| if(IsEmpty(insight_time_to_remediation), 0, insight_time_to_remediation) as insight_time_to_remediation
| floor(insight_time_to_remediation/60/60/24) as insight_time_to_remediation_days
| insight_time_to_remediation - (insight_time_to_remediation_days*24*60*60) as insight_time_to_remediation
| floor(insight_time_to_remediation/60/60) as insight_time_to_remediation_hours
| insight_time_to_remediation - (insight_time_to_remediation_hours*60*60) as insight_time_to_remediation
| floor(insight_time_to_remediation/60) as insight_time_to_remediation_minutes
| insight_time_to_remediation - (insight_time_to_remediation_minutes*60) as insight_time_to_remediation
| floor(insight_time_to_remediation) as insight_time_to_remediation_seconds
| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_days), ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_hours), ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_minutes), ToInt(insight_time_to_remediation_seconds)) as insight_time_to_remediation

| if(IsEmpty(insight_time_to_detection), 0, insight_time_to_detection) as insight_time_to_detection
| floor(insight_time_to_detection/60/60/24) as insight_time_to_detection_days
| insight_time_to_detection - (insight_time_to_detection_days*24*60*60) as insight_time_to_detection
| floor(insight_time_to_detection/60/60) as insight_time_to_detection_hours
| insight_time_to_detection - (insight_time_to_detection_hours*60*60) as insight_time_to_detection
| floor(insight_time_to_detection/60) as insight_time_to_detection_minutes
| insight_time_to_detection - (insight_time_to_detection_minutes*60) as insight_time_to_detection
| floor(insight_time_to_detection) as insight_time_to_detection_seconds
| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(insight_time_to_detection_days), ToInt(insight_time_to_detection_hours), ToInt(insight_time_to_detection_minutes), ToInt(insight_time_to_detection_seconds)) as insight_time_to_detection

| if(IsEmpty(insight_time_to_response), 0, insight_time_to_response) as insight_time_to_response
| floor(insight_time_to_response/60/60/24) as insight_time_to_response_days
| insight_time_to_response - (insight_time_to_response_days*24*60*60) as insight_time_to_response
| floor(insight_time_to_response/60/60) as insight_time_to_response_hours
| insight_time_to_response - (insight_time_to_response_hours*60*60) as insight_time_to_response
| floor(insight_time_to_response/60) as insight_time_to_response_minutes
| insight_time_to_response - (insight_time_to_response_minutes*60) as insight_time_to_response
| floor(insight_time_to_response) as insight_time_to_response_seconds
| format("%s Days, %s Hrs, %s Min, %s Sec", ToInt(insight_time_to_response_days), ToInt(insight_time_to_response_hours), ToInt(insight_time_to_response_minutes), ToInt(insight_time_to_response_seconds)) as insight_time_to_response

| count by insight_createdAt, insight_closedAt, insight_id,signal_count ,insight_severity,insight_description, insight_name, insight_assignee ,insight_ruleId, insight_tags, insight_time_to_response , insight_time_to_detection, insight_time_to_remediation , operator_email, insight_resolution, entity_value, entity_type, entity_id
| fields - _count

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides metrics around closed insights.
